title: Spicy Silky Slovak Salt Cod Stir-fry
description: This vibrant brunch dish features salt cod stir-fried with spicy peppers and a creamy sauce in a way that’s sure to satisfy any craving for traditional Slovak cuisine, while keeping the meal vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Salt cod fillets
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's properly soaked and drained before use.

ingredients.name: Bell peppers, julienned
ingredients.notes: Red and green bell peppers for color contrast and mild heat.

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add enough oil to coat the bottom of the pan.
Add salt cod fillets and sauté for about 5 minutes until golden brown on all sides, flipping occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Add minced garlic and finely chopped onion; stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until fragrant and onions are translucent.
Fold in julienned bell peppers. Continue stirring for an additional minute allowing the flavors to meld together.
In a small mixing bowl, combine soy sauce with cayenne pepper flakes. Stir gently into the skillet mixture.
Reduce heat to low-medium. Cover the pan and let cook until salt cod is cooked through (about 5 more minutes).
Sprinkle chopped parsley on top before serving.
